description: Reusable public course description content. This file does not define scheduling rules, course IDs, appointment URLs, pricing, or visibility.

209806.title: AHA BLS Provider
209806.short_description: Healthcare provider BLS for clinical workers, dental teams, EMS students, and healthcare students.
209806.who_this_is_for: Students who need an American Heart Association BLS Provider card for patient care, school, licensing, or healthcare employment.
required_materials: Current AHA BLS Provider Student Manual or accepted eBook when required.
209806.certification_issued: American Heart Association BLS Provider eCard, valid for two years after successful completion.
compliance_acceptance_notes: Use Heartsaver instead when your requirement is non-healthcare CPR/AED or first aid.

359474.title: AHA BLS Provider Renewal
359474.short_description: Focused BLS renewal for students who already hold or recently held BLS certification.
359474.who_this_is_for: Current or recently expired BLS providers renewing an AHA BLS Provider card.
required_materials: Current AHA BLS Provider Student Manual or accepted eBook when required.
359474.certification_issued: American Heart Association BLS Provider eCard, valid for two years after successful completion.
compliance_acceptance_notes: Choose the full Provider option if your employer or school requires an initial course.

210549.title: AHA HeartCode BLS
210549.short_description: In-person skills session for students who completed the AHA HeartCode BLS online course.
210549.who_this_is_for: Healthcare students and providers who already completed the official AHA HeartCode BLS online portion.
required_materials: Completed AHA HeartCode BLS certificate of completion before the skills session.
210549.certification_issued: American Heart Association BLS Provider eCard, valid for two years after successful completion.
compliance_acceptance_notes: This is the skills session, not the online course purchase.

241108.title: AHA ACLS Provider
241108.short_description: Advanced cardiovascular life support for clinicians who manage adult cardiac emergencies.
241108.who_this_is_for: Healthcare professionals involved in adult cardiac arrest, peri-arrest, stroke, or advanced cardiovascular response.
required_materials: Current AHA ACLS Provider Manual or accepted eBook when required.
241108.certification_issued: American Heart Association ACLS Provider eCard, valid for two years after successful completion.
compliance_acceptance_notes: Confirm prerequisites with your employer, school, or licensing program.

209818.title: AHA ACLS Renewal
209818.short_description: ACLS renewal for current providers who need a focused recertification path.
209818.who_this_is_for: Current ACLS providers renewing an existing AHA ACLS Provider card.
required_materials: Current AHA ACLS Provider Manual or accepted eBook when required.
209818.certification_issued: American Heart Association ACLS Provider eCard, valid for two years after successful completion.
compliance_acceptance_notes: Choose ACLS Provider if you need a full initial class.

209811.title: AHA ACLS HeartCode
209811.short_description: ACLS skills session for students who completed the official AHA HeartCode ACLS online course.
209811.who_this_is_for: Clinicians completing the blended HeartCode ACLS path.
required_materials: Completed AHA HeartCode ACLS certificate of completion before the skills session.
209811.certification_issued: American Heart Association ACLS Provider eCard, valid for two years after successful completion.
compliance_acceptance_notes: This is the skills portion, not the online HeartCode course purchase.

209805.title: AHA PALS Provider
209805.short_description: Pediatric advanced life support for clinicians who care for infants and children in emergencies.
209805.who_this_is_for: Healthcare professionals involved in pediatric respiratory, shock, cardiac arrest, or emergency response.
required_materials: Current AHA PALS Provider Manual or accepted eBook when required.
209805.certification_issued: American Heart Association PALS Provider eCard, valid for two years after successful completion.
compliance_acceptance_notes: Confirm pediatric advanced life support requirements with your employer or program.

251496.title: AHA PALS Renewal
251496.short_description: Focused PALS renewal for current pediatric advanced life support providers.
251496.who_this_is_for: Current PALS providers renewing an existing AHA PALS Provider card.
required_materials: Current AHA PALS Provider Manual or accepted eBook when required.
251496.certification_issued: American Heart Association PALS Provider eCard, valid for two years after successful completion.
compliance_acceptance_notes: Choose PALS Provider if you need a full initial class.

209812.title: AHA PALS HeartCode
209812.short_description: PALS skills session for students who completed the official AHA HeartCode PALS online course.
209812.who_this_is_for: Clinicians completing the blended HeartCode PALS pathway.
required_materials: Completed AHA HeartCode PALS certificate of completion before the skills session.
209812.certification_issued: American Heart Association PALS Provider eCard, valid for two years after successful completion.
compliance_acceptance_notes: This is the skills portion, not the online HeartCode course purchase.

344085.title: AHA Heartsaver CPR AED
344085.short_description: CPR and AED training for workplace, school, family, and community requirements that do not require first aid.
344085.who_this_is_for: Students who need CPR/AED certification without a first aid component.
topics_covered: Adult, child, and infant CPR concepts
required_materials: Course materials as assigned for the selected class format.
344085.certification_issued: American Heart Association Heartsaver CPR AED course completion card, valid for two years after successful completion.
compliance_acceptance_notes: This does not satisfy requirements that specifically ask for First Aid + CPR + AED.
This is not BLS for healthcare providers.

209808.title: AHA Heartsaver CPR AED Online + Skills
209808.short_description: Blended CPR/AED option with online coursework followed by an in-person skills session.
209808.who_this_is_for: Students whose requirement accepts AHA Heartsaver CPR AED and who prefer online coursework before skills practice.
required_materials: Completed AHA Heartsaver CPR AED Online certificate before the skills session.
209808.certification_issued: American Heart Association Heartsaver CPR AED course completion card, valid for two years after successful completion.
compliance_acceptance_notes: This does not satisfy requirements that specifically ask for First Aid + CPR + AED.
Confirm blended learning acceptance before registering.

209809.title: AHA Heartsaver First Aid CPR AED
209809.short_description: First Aid, CPR, and AED training for workplace, school, and professional requirements.
209809.who_this_is_for: Students who need a combined first aid, CPR, and AED certification for work, school, licensing, or general preparedness.
required_materials: Course materials as assigned for the selected class format.
209809.certification_issued: American Heart Association Heartsaver First Aid CPR AED course completion card, valid for two years after successful completion.
compliance_acceptance_notes: Use this path when your requirement specifically includes first aid plus CPR/AED.

329495.title: AHA Heartsaver First Aid CPR AED Online + Skills
329495.short_description: Blended First Aid/CPR/AED option with online coursework and an in-person skills session.
329495.who_this_is_for: Students whose requirement accepts blended Heartsaver First Aid CPR AED.
topics_covered: Online first aid, CPR, and AED coursework
required_materials: Completed AHA Heartsaver First Aid CPR AED Online certificate before the skills session.
329495.certification_issued: American Heart Association Heartsaver First Aid CPR AED course completion card, valid for two years after successful completion.
compliance_acceptance_notes: Confirm blended learning acceptance before registering.

351632.title: AHA Heartsaver Pediatric First Aid / CPR / AED
351632.short_description: Pediatric first aid, CPR, AED, and emergency recognition for childcare, school, camp, and youth settings.
351632.who_this_is_for: Childcare providers, school staff, camp staff, caregivers, and youth-program teams that need pediatric first aid with CPR/AED.
required_materials: Course materials as assigned for the selected class format.
351632.certification_issued: American Heart Association Heartsaver Pediatric First Aid CPR AED course completion card, valid for two years after successful completion.
compliance_acceptance_notes: Designed for pediatric and childcare-related requirements.
North Carolina childcare programs should verify the exact requirement with their licensing or employer contact.

251545.title: AHA Heartsaver Pediatric First Aid CPR AED Online + Skills
251545.short_description: Blended pediatric First Aid/CPR/AED option with online coursework and in-person skills.
251545.who_this_is_for: Childcare, school, camp, and caregiver students whose requirement accepts the AHA blended pediatric path.
topics_covered: Online pediatric first aid, CPR, and AED coursework
required_materials: Completed AHA pediatric Heartsaver online certificate before the skills session.
251545.certification_issued: American Heart Association Heartsaver Pediatric First Aid CPR AED course completion card, valid for two years after successful completion.
compliance_acceptance_notes: Confirm blended learning acceptance before registering.

248288.title: American Red Cross Basic Life Support
248288.short_description: Red Cross BLS option for healthcare students and providers whose requirement specifically accepts ARC.
248288.who_this_is_for: Students whose employer, school, or program asks for American Red Cross BLS.
required_materials: Course materials as assigned for the selected Red Cross class format.
248288.certification_issued: American Red Cross certificate after successful completion.
compliance_acceptance_notes: Use ARC only when your requirement accepts or requests Red Cross certification.

248287.title: American Red Cross Basic Life Support - Blended Learning
248287.short_description: Red Cross blended BLS option for students whose requirement accepts ARC blended learning.
248287.who_this_is_for: Students assigned or allowed to complete Red Cross BLS using a blended online-plus-skills path.
required_materials: Completed Red Cross online assignment before the skills session when required.
248287.certification_issued: American Red Cross certificate after successful completion.
compliance_acceptance_notes: Confirm blended ARC acceptance before registering.

445670.title: HSI BLS + Adult First Aid
445670.short_description: HSI blended option combining Basic Life Support with Adult First Aid/CPR/AED.
445670.who_this_is_for: Workplaces, healthcare-adjacent teams, dental offices, ABA providers, and organizations that accept HSI and need both BLS and first aid coverage.
required_materials: Completed assigned HSI online coursework before the skills session.
445670.certification_issued: HSI certification issued after successful completion and valid for two years.
compliance_acceptance_notes: Confirm that your employer or program accepts HSI certification.

463743.title: HSI BLS
463743.short_description: HSI BLS option for students whose requirement accepts HSI Basic Life Support.
463743.who_this_is_for: Healthcare or workplace students whose employer, school, or program accepts HSI BLS.
required_materials: Course materials as assigned for the selected HSI class format.
463743.certification_issued: HSI certification issued after successful completion.
compliance_acceptance_notes: Confirm that your employer or program accepts HSI certification.
